detectors.description:
Reentrancy in WalletSimple.sendMultiSigToken(address,uint256,address,uint256,uint256,bytes) (Forwarder.sol#391-413):
	External calls:
	- ! instance.transfer(toAddress,value) (Forwarder.sol#405)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- TokenTransacted(msg.sender,otherSigner,operationHash,toAddress,value,tokenContractAddress) (Forwarder.sol#411)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [WalletSimple.sendMultiSigToken(address,uint256,address,uint256,uint256,bytes)](Forwarder.sol#L391-L413):
	External calls:
	- [! instance.transfer(toAddress,value)](Forwarder.sol#L405)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [TokenTransacted(msg.sender,otherSigner,operationHash,toAddress,value,tokenContractAddress)](Forwarder.sol#L411)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Forwarder.flushTokens(address) (Forwarder.sol#115-137):
	External calls:
	- forwarderBalance = instance.balanceOf(forwarderAddress) (Forwarder.sol#121)
	- ! instance.transfer(parentAddress,forwarderBalance) (Forwarder.sol#129)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- TokensFlushed(tokenContractAddress,forwarderBalance) (Forwarder.sol#135)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Forwarder.flushTokens(address)](Forwarder.sol#L115-L137):
	External calls:
	- [forwarderBalance = instance.balanceOf(forwarderAddress)](Forwarder.sol#L121)
	- [! instance.transfer(parentAddress,forwarderBalance)](Forwarder.sol#L129)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [TokensFlushed(tokenContractAddress,forwarderBalance)](Forwarder.sol#L135)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in WalletSimple.sendMultiSig(address,uint256,bytes,uint256,uint256,bytes) (Forwarder.sol#339-363):

	- ! (toAddress.call.value(value)(data)) (Forwarder.sol#353)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transacted(msg.sender,otherSigner,operationHash,toAddress,value,data) (Forwarder.sol#361)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.14 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector
	- DelegateCallReturnValue.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.14 (Forwarder.sol#1)

	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x

It is used by:
